RT @bungomaduke: Kabuchai MP Majimbo Kalasinga anadhani insulting Wetangula and singing Mimi ndio Sifuna will win him the coming elections. Some people are just ungrateful. He contested for the Kabuchai MP seat Mara mbili na Zote hakuwahi fika Kura hata 2K. The third time Wetangula picked him, financed him and he went ahead to win the elections. Weta has vowed to send him back home. He will learn the hard way. Papa Wa Roma never forgives disrespect. Kitaeleweka. Akule za mwisho mwisho. 2027 anarudi nyumbani.
